compiled_state.title: As a developer, project-setup recommends ast-grep installation during onboarding
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add ast-grep as a recommended optional dependency in the project-setup skill so that new projects are informed about structural code search capabilities during onboarding.
**Why**: Onboarding is the natural point to surface optional tooling. Including ast-grep in project-setup ensures developers know about it from the start.
**Scope**:
- IN: project-setup SKILL.md update mentioning ast-grep as a recommended optional tool with installation instructions
- OUT: Making ast-grep required, changes to onboarding SKILL.md (project-setup handles tool recommendations)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, project-setup SKILL.md or the onboarding flow references ast-grep as a recommended optional dependency with installation instructions
  ← Satisfies: "ast-grep is documented as a recommended dependency: installation instructions in README and /dso:project-setup"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] project-setup may redirect to onboarding — check which skill actually handles tool recommendations and update the correct one

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] project-setup or onboarding SKILL.md references ast-grep as recommended optional dependency
- [ ] Installation instructions for macOS and Linux are present
Verify: grep -q 'ast-grep' plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md || grep -q 'ast-grep' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — project-setup/SKILL.md is a redirect stub; onboarding/SKILL.md is the actual skill that handles tool setup and infrastructure. Will add ast-grep recommendation to Phase 3 (infrastructure section) of onboarding/SKILL.md.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — added 3 RED tests to tests/skills/test-project-setup-dependencies.sh: test_ast_grep_recommended, test_ast_grep_macos_install, test_ast_grep_linux_install — all failing as expected
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — added Optional Tools section to onboarding/SKILL.md Phase 3 (Step 2c) with ast-grep recommendation including brew (macOS) and cargo (Linux) install commands
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — test suite: 13/13 PASS, format/hook-drift/CI failures are pre-existing on main (unrelated to this change). AC verify command: PASS.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: ast-grep guidance added with canonical guard/fallback pattern and tests
comments.author: Test
